title: The First Observation
briefing: The opening transmission was preserved exactly as received. Meaning rarely disappears; it merely changes its shape.
success_message: You noticed what others ignored. A second node has awakened.

title: A Message Beneath
briefing: Pages speak twice: once to the observer and once to the machine. Search where presentation ends and structure begins.

title: The Hidden Surface
briefing: The visible page is only the surface. Five fragments are scattered across places the ordinary observer ignores. Recover them. Preserve their order.
artifact:
FRAGMENTS REQUIRED: 5

SOURCE // STYLE // CONSOLE // ROBOTS // RESTRICTED
success_message: Five surfaces. One sentence. You are beginning to see.
